---
pagetitle: "Teaching — Muhammet Özkaraca"
---

<div class="container page-content">

<h2 class="section-title">Teaching Assistant</h2>

<div class="timeline-container">

<div class="teaching-item">
<div class="teaching-term">Spring 2026<br />Fall 2025</div>
<div>
<h3>POLI 150: International Relations and Global Politics</h3>
<div class="pub-links">[<a href="slides/sample_slides.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Sample Slides</a>]</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="teaching-item">
<div class="teaching-term">Summer 2026<br />Summer 2025</div>
<div>
<h3>Summer PhD Math Camp</h3>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<h2>Grader</h2>

<div class="timeline-container">

<div class="teaching-item">
<div class="teaching-term">Spring 2025</div>
<div>
<h3>POLI 150: International Relations and Global Politics</h3>
</div>
</div>

<div class="teaching-item">
<div class="teaching-term">Fall 2024</div>
<div>
<h3>POLI/PWAD 444: Terrorism and International Peace</h3>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
